meta.title: What Type of Villain Are You?
meta.description: Discover your villain archetype through 10 scenario-based questions. Are you the Mastermind, the Charmer, the Rebel, the Tyrant, the Trickster, or the Fallen Hero?

intro.title: What Type of Villain Are You?
intro.subtitle: 10 scenarios to reveal the darkness within

q1.question: You lead a secret organization. You just learned there's a traitor among you. What do you do?
q1.a: Quietly gather intel and set a trap so the traitor reveals themselves
q1.b: Talk to each member privately, feigning trust while extracting information
q1.c: The traitor doesn't matter — the real problem is the corrupt system itself
q1.d: Immediately punish the suspects to send a warning to the rest

q2.question: Your enemy has discovered your weakness. How do you respond?
q2.a: Exaggerate the weakness to hide the real one. Confusion is the best shield
q2.b: I anticipated this scenario long ago and already have countermeasures
q2.c: Accept the weakness and show it made me stronger
q2.d: Make the enemy an ally with a charming offer

q3.question: You've gained absolute power. What's the first thing you do?
q3.a: Eliminate all opposition and establish total order
q3.b: Make people love me. Charm lasts longer than fear
q3.c: Tear down the corrupt system entirely and build a new order
q3.d: Build a system to control everything from the shadows

q4.question: A colleague who betrayed you begs for forgiveness. What do you do?
q4.a: Pretend to forgive, then execute a far greater revenge later. Timing is everything
q4.b: Truly forgive them. I too have betrayed someone before
q4.c: Punish them publicly as an example to others
q4.d: Analyze the motive of the betrayal and use it in my strategy

q5.question: The hero kneels before you. What do you say?
q5.a: "Get up. We're on the same side — just with different methods."
q5.b: "See? The rules of this world are rotten. Let's change them together."
q5.c: "Amusing. But this is only the beginning."
q5.d: "I was once like you. But the world made me this way."

q6.question: It's the final stage of your grand plan. But an unexpected variable appears.
q6.a: I already have five backup plans. In chess, you always predict the next move
q6.b: Variable or not, I push through with force. Obstacles are meant to be crushed
q6.c: Win the variable over with charm and persuasion
q6.d: A variable is an opportunity. I thrive in chaos

q7.question: Your hideout has been discovered. You have 30 minutes.
q7.a: Scramble all evidence randomly. The more they investigate, the more confused they get
q7.b: Let them come in. This place is a trap
q7.c: I'm furious. Let them come. I'll face them head-on
q7.d: Calmly take what matters and leave. Live to fight another day

q8.question: You need to recruit new allies. What method do you choose?
q8.a: Approach personally and exploit their dreams and desires
q8.b: Find the oppressed and give a rallying speech: "Let's fight together"
q8.c: Gather everyone's weaknesses and secrets to build an intelligence network
q8.d: Recruit no one. Working alone is better. Trust is a luxury

q9.question: What's your strategy for the final confrontation?
q9.a: Overwhelm them with firepower and forces in a full frontal assault
q9.b: Strike from an unexpected angle. A method no one could predict
q9.c: Persuade the enemy's key figure to switch sides
q9.d: Prove that the enemy's cause is flawed to crush their morale

q10.question: When it's all over, how do you want to be remembered?
q10.a: "He was once a hero. But the world betrayed him."
q10.b: "No one ever knew his true plan. Everything went according to his design."
q10.d: "Was he real, or was he an illusion? No one knows."

mastermind.name: The Mastermind
mastermind.title: The Shadow Puppeteer
mastermind.description: You always think ten steps ahead. You never act directly — everything flows according to your plan. People move on your chessboard without even knowing you exist.
mastermind.quote: The greatest move is making your opponent believe it was their choice.

charmer.name: The Charmer
charmer.title: The Seductive Manipulator
charmer.description: You control people through charisma and charm. You rule through fascination, not fear, and no one ever knows your true intentions. Everyone loves you — and that's exactly the trap.
charmer.quote: People give everything to someone who makes them feel understood.

rebel.name: The Rebel
rebel.title: The System Destroyer
rebel.description: You're an anti-hero fighting to tear down corrupt systems. Your methods may be extreme, but your cause is purer than anyone's. You know revolutions can't be made with clean hands.
rebel.quote: A rotten tree needs to be uprooted, not pruned.

tyrant.name: The Tyrant
tyrant.title: The Embodiment of Absolute Power
tyrant.description: You rule through force and intimidation. There is no compromise — your will is law. You believe in order through fear, and only the strong deserve to lead.
tyrant.quote: Only those who can bear the weight of the crown deserve to wear it.

trickster.name: The Trickster
trickster.title: The Maestro of Chaos
trickster.description: You shine in unpredictable chaos. Rules exist to be broken, and seriousness is your enemy. You turn everything into a game — and you always win.
trickster.quote: When the world burns, the most beautiful thing is the flame itself.

fallen.name: The Fallen Hero
fallen.title: The Tragic Protagonist
fallen.description: You once fought for justice. But betrayal and loss changed you. Behind your ruthlessness lies the idealism of your past — and that's what makes you the most dangerous villain of all.
fallen.quote: The world creates heroes, but it also creates villains.

share.title: Share Your Result
share.text: My villain type is: {type}! What type of villain are you?
